rusty_dagger.name: Rusty Dagger
rusty_dagger.description: A worn dagger with spots of rust. Still sharp enough to be useful.

crystal_blade.name: Crystal Blade
crystal_blade.description: A blade forged from pure crystal, shimmering with arcane energy.

shadow_dagger.name: Shadow Dagger
shadow_dagger.description: A dagger that seems to absorb light, leaving trails of darkness when swung.

forge_hammer.name: Forge Hammer
forge_hammer.description: A massive hammer still warm from the cosmic forges, crackling with residual heat.

storm_feather_blade.name: Storm Feather Blade
storm_feather_blade.description: A sword adorned with storm hawk feathers, crackling with lightning.

cosmic_blade.name: Cosmic Blade
cosmic_blade.description: A blade forged from condensed starlight, leaving trails of cosmic dust.

void_shard_sword.name: Void Shard Sword
void_shard_sword.description: A terrifying blade made from crystallized void energy, cutting through reality itself.

dragon_quill.name: Dragon Quill
dragon_quill.description: A razor-sharp quill from a paper dragon, inscribed with powerful words.

tuning_fork.name: Initiate's Tuning Fork
tuning_fork.description: A small silver fork that hums a single pure note when struck. Weak as a weapon, but it cuts through illusion where steel cannot.

drum_stave.name: Obsidian Drum-Stave
drum_stave.description: The Obsidian Drum-Stave, reforged by Morwyn Ironheart from your Tuning Fork. Each strike lands with the weight of Matter itself.

obsidian_drum_stave_instrument.name: Drum-Stave Resonator
obsidian_drum_stave_instrument.description: A resonant echo of the Obsidian Drum-Stave, keyed to the Note of Matter. One of the five Primordial Instruments.

silver_harp_of_creation.name: Silver Harp of Creation
silver_harp_of_creation.description: Valdris's Silver Harp of Creation. Its strings are spun from light; when played, reality briefly writes itself.

golden_trumpet_of_change.name: Golden Trumpet of Change
golden_trumpet_of_change.description: Zephyros's trumpet. Its note is the note of transformation - nothing that hears it stays the same.

lute_of_whispering_shadows.name: Lute of Whispering Shadows
lute_of_whispering_shadows.description: Nyxara's lute. Its strings are woven of void; it plays only what has been forgotten.

crystal_flute_of_wisdom.name: Crystal Flute of Wisdom
crystal_flute_of_wisdom.description: Thessarian's flute. Each note is a paradox resolved; each silence is a question answered.

leather_vest.name: Leather Vest
leather_vest.description: Simple leather armor offering basic protection.

crystal_shard_armor.name: Crystal Shard Armor
crystal_shard_armor.description: Armor embedded with protective crystal shards that deflect attacks.

thorn_armor.name: Thorn Armor
thorn_armor.description: Living armor made of enchanted thorns, painful to attackers.

shadow_cloak.name: Shadow Cloak
shadow_cloak.description: A cloak woven from pure shadow, making the wearer harder to hit.

shade_robe.name: Shade Robe
shade_robe.description: Robes worn by mage shades, imbued with protective necromantic energy.

arcane_crystal_armor.name: Arcane Crystal Armor
arcane_crystal_armor.description: Legendary armor forged from pure arcane crystals, radiating protective magic.

cloud_wool_cloak.name: Cloud Wool Cloak
cloud_wool_cloak.description: A fluffy cloak made from cloud sheep wool, surprisingly protective.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.description: A simple wooden shield, better than nothing.

crystal_shield.name: Crystal Shield
crystal_shield.description: A shield of solid crystal that refracts incoming attacks.

void_barrier.name: Void Barrier
void_barrier.description: A shield made of condensed void energy, absorbing attacks into nothingness.

leather_cap.name: Leather Cap
leather_cap.description: A plain leather cap. Won't stop a blade, but it stops the rain.

iron_helm.name: Iron Helm
iron_helm.description: A dented iron helm. The previous owner stopped needing it.

bone_circlet.name: Bone Circlet
bone_circlet.description: A circlet of polished bone that hums when worn. Unsettling and effective.

traveler_amulet.name: Traveler's Amulet
traveler_amulet.description: A small amulet carved from oak. It brings a faint sense of calm.

warding_pendant.name: Warding Pendant
warding_pendant.description: A pendant inscribed with a single, steady rune of warding.

star_pendant.name: Pendant of the Pale Star
star_pendant.description: A pendant that holds a fragment of a dead star. Cold to the touch.

leather_gloves.name: Leather Gloves
leather_gloves.description: Worn gloves of supple leather. Good grip, little else.

iron_gauntlets.name: Iron Gauntlets
iron_gauntlets.description: Heavy iron gauntlets that double as knuckle-dusters.

runed_gauntlets.name: Runed Gauntlets
runed_gauntlets.description: Gauntlets etched with protective runes that glow faintly in combat.

worn_boots.name: Worn Boots
worn_boots.description: Boots that have walked a long road. Still have a few miles in them.

ironshod_boots.name: Ironshod Boots
ironshod_boots.description: Boots reinforced with iron plates. Loud, but durable.

stormwalker_boots.name: Stormwalker Boots
stormwalker_boots.description: Boots that seem to barely touch the ground when you walk.

silver_band.name: Silver Band
silver_band.description: A plain silver band. Warm to the touch for reasons you can't quite place.

signet_of_patience.name: Signet of Patience
signet_of_patience.description: A carved signet ring. Wearing it feels like holding your breath.

ring_of_the_archmage.name: Ring of the Archmage
ring_of_the_archmage.description: A black ring with a single chip of condensed magic at its center.

minor_healing_potion.name: Minor Healing Potion
minor_healing_potion.description: A small red potion that restores 30 HP when consumed.

greater_healing_potion.name: Greater Healing Potion
greater_healing_potion.description: A larger healing potion that restores 75 HP when consumed.

superior_healing_potion.name: Superior Healing Potion
superior_healing_potion.description: A powerful healing elixir that restores 150 HP when consumed.

guardian_essence.name: Guardian Essence
guardian_essence.description: The essence of an echo guardian, providing minor healing.

ember_heart.name: Ember Heart
ember_heart.description: A glowing ember sprite heart that burns away wounds.

sprite_dust.name: Sprite Dust
sprite_dust.description: Magical dust from a garden sprite that provides light healing.

jellyfish_oil.name: Jellyfish Oil
jellyfish_oil.description: Luminous oil from a floating jellyfish with restorative properties.

wind_essence.name: Wind Essence
wind_essence.description: Captured essence of a wind elemental, invigorating when consumed.

digested_wisdom.name: Digested Wisdom
digested_wisdom.description: Knowledge distilled into consumable form by a bookworm.

eternal_raindrop.name: Eternal Raindrop
eternal_raindrop.description: A raindrop that never evaporates, providing refreshing healing.

null_essence.name: Null Essence
null_essence.description: The paradoxical essence of nothingness, strangely restorative.

nebula_dust.name: Nebula Dust
nebula_dust.description: Cosmic dust from a nebula wisp, powerful healing properties.

spell_essence.name: Spell Essence
spell_essence.description: Pure magical energy in consumable form, potent healing.

minor_mana_potion.name: Minor Mana Potion
minor_mana_potion.description: A small blue potion that restores 20 mana when consumed.

greater_mana_potion.name: Greater Mana Potion
greater_mana_potion.description: A larger mana potion that restores 50 mana when consumed.

superior_mana_potion.name: Superior Mana Potion
superior_mana_potion.description: A powerful mana elixir that restores 100 mana when consumed.

rejuvenation_potion.name: Rejuvenation Potion
rejuvenation_potion.description: A swirling purple potion that restores both 50 HP and 50 mana.

arcane_infusion.name: Arcane Infusion
arcane_infusion.description: A vial of pure arcane essence that fully restores even the greatest mages.

memory_fragment.name: Memory Fragment
memory_fragment.description: A crystallized fragment of forgotten memory, slightly glowing.

crystal_silk.name: Crystal Silk
crystal_silk.description: Shimmering silk spun by crystal spiders, valuable to merchants.

golem_core.name: Golem Core
golem_core.description: The magical core of a gem golem, pulsing with residual energy.

rainbow_wing.name: Rainbow Wing
rainbow_wing.description: A prismatic bat wing that splits light into beautiful colors.

wraith_essence.name: Wraith Essence
wraith_essence.description: Bottled essence of a marsh wraith, cold to the touch.

shadow_tongue.name: Shadow Tongue
shadow_tongue.description: The tongue of a shadow frog, useful for dark rituals.

wisp_light.name: Wisp Light
wisp_light.description: A captured will-o-wisp light, eternally flickering.

storm_feather.name: Storm Feather
storm_feather.description: A feather from a storm hawk, crackling with static electricity.

salamander_scale.name: Salamander Scale
salamander_scale.description: A heat-resistant scale from a fire salamander.

forbidden_tome.name: Forbidden Tome
forbidden_tome.description: A book of forbidden knowledge, whispers when opened.

lightning_core.name: Lightning Core
lightning_core.description: The crackling core of a lightning elemental.

thunder_egg.name: Thunder Egg
thunder_egg.description: An egg from a thunder bird, rumbles with contained power.

void_shard.name: Void Shard
void_shard.description: A fragment of pure void, seemingly consuming light around it.

reality_fragment.name: Reality Fragment
reality_fragment.description: A piece of reality itself, showing different worlds when viewed.

star_fragment.name: Star Fragment
star_fragment.description: A piece of a fallen star, warm and glowing eternally.

cosmic_eye.name: Cosmic Eye
cosmic_eye.description: An eye from a cosmic horror, seeing things beyond mortal comprehension.

arcane_crystal.name: Arcane Crystal
arcane_crystal.description: A crystal pulsing with pure arcane energy.

crystal_dragon_scale.name: Crystal Dragon Scale
crystal_dragon_scale.description: A magnificent scale from the Crystal Dragon, refracting light into rainbows.

shadow_crown.name: Shadow Crown
shadow_crown.description: The crown of the Shadow Lord, radiating pure darkness.

crown_of_the_realms.name: Crown of the Realms
crown_of_the_realms.description: The ultimate treasure, worn by the Archmage Supreme. Proof of conquering the Shattered Realms.

void_crown.name: Crown of the Void
void_crown.description: A crown that seems to absorb light itself, worn by the guardian of the void threshold.

void_heart_crystal.name: Void Heart Crystal
void_heart_crystal.description: A pulsing crystal containing the essence of void energy.

iron_scrap.name: Iron Scrap
iron_scrap.description: A shard of raw iron. Crafting material.

ember_core.name: Ember Core
ember_core.description: A still-burning coal drawn from the Molten Forges. Crafting material.

harmonic_shard.name: Harmonic Shard
harmonic_shard.description: A crystal that hums in sympathy with spoken words. Crafting material.

fire_essence.name: Fire Essence
fire_essence.description: Bottled flame. Burns cold until broken. Crafting material.

herb_bundle.name: Herb Bundle
herb_bundle.description: A tied bundle of medicinal herbs. Crafting material.

mana_petal.name: Mana Petal
mana_petal.description: A petal that stores arcane energy. Crafting material.

phoenix_feather.name: Phoenix Feather
phoenix_feather.description: A feather that still remembers being fire. Rare crafting material.

sharpened_dagger.name: Sharpened Dagger
sharpened_dagger.description: A dagger honed to a whisper-edge by a weaponsmith's patience.

warhammer.name: Warhammer
warhammer.description: A two-handed hammer with an ember-warm head.

resonant_edge.name: Resonant Edge
resonant_edge.description: A blade forged around a harmonic shard. It sings when it strikes.

fire_ward_ring.name: Ring of Fire Ward
fire_ward_ring.description: Silver band etched with fire wards. Softens fire damage.

spell_focus_amulet.name: Spell Focus Amulet
spell_focus_amulet.description: A traveler's amulet wound with harmonic thread. Widens the well of mana.

minor_healing_brew.name: Minor Healing Brew
minor_healing_brew.description: A bitter brew that patches wounds closed.

mana_draught.name: Mana Draught
mana_draught.description: A petal-green draught that restores mana.

greater_healing_brew.name: Greater Healing Brew
greater_healing_brew.description: A phoenix-warm brew. Mends even deep wounds.

resonant_blade.name: Resonant Blade
resonant_blade.description: A blade that vibrates with stored questing-will. QP redemption item.

quiet_ring.name: Ring of Quiet Hours
quiet_ring.description: A ring of brushed steel. The world hushes when you turn it. QP redemption item.

tier1_harmonist_crown.name: Crown of the Reborn Harmonist
tier1_harmonist_crown.description: A slim circlet of sound-etched silver. Only a Tier-1 Harmonist can wear it without going deaf. QP redemption, tier-gated.

tier3_symphonic_blade.name: Symphonic Blade of the Third Loop
tier3_symphonic_blade.description: Three times remorted, three times reforged. The blade hums in harmonic sympathy with its wielder's three-fold return. QP redemption, tier-gated.
